mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE 1=1
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, email, phone, real_name, avatar, status, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{realName}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, real_name = #{realName}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
